twitter_thread: 87% of Pet Simulator 99 players use auto-farm tools, but only 3% earn over 100k coins per hour.
Dimasarestuprasmanto's Tera edition outperforms PerglerVitek's by 25% in hatch rates.
Prioritizing Backrooms League tasks boosts coin farming by 40%, compared to focusing on egg hatching.
NagaaSaketh's Ultimate edition requires 2 hours of setup, but increases farm efficiency by 50%.
Failing to adjust farm settings during in-game events like 'Double Coins' can cost 20k coins per hour.
Using multiple auto-farm tools simultaneously increases ban risk by 300%.
What's your highest single-hour coin farming total in Pet Simulator 99? #petsimulator99 #coinfarming
